privileged_info_summary: The OpenCAD system uses a real open-source Computer Aided Dispatch application designed for roleplay communities. The official OpenCAD database schema defines 9 departments, with department ID 1 being 'Communications' (SAECOMM - San Andreas Emergency Communications). The task involves creating a synthetic dispatcher user account with the name 'Elena Ross', email 'elena.ross@opencad.local', identifier 'DISP-99', and assigning them to the Communications department. All department-related metadata has been verified against the official OpenCAD GTAV game data schema from the GitHub repository. The user account details are task-specific test values created for this simulation scenario.
